title: Memorial To D. C.
content:
[VASSAR COLLEGE, 1918]


             Oh, loveliest throat of all sweet throats,
                 Where now no more the music is,
             With hands that wrote you little notes
                 I write you little elegies!
meaning:
"Memorial To D. C." is a quintessential example of Edna St. Vincent Millay's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
